text:
Your $500 ACH deposit from 4 business days ago hasn't posted yet, and I understand the site's stated window is 1-3 business days — I can't confirm from here whether it failed or is still processing.

I'm sending this to our payments team to look into. It may help to have the approximate time you initiated the deposit and the last 4 digits of the bank account it came from, so have those ready if they follow up.

Novig Support
